name: Breakfast Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitute: Use 3 cups frozen shredded hash brown potatoes.
Do not thaw.
2. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
3. Cover the potatoes with water and drain as directed on the package, omitting salt.
4. Spread the drained potatoes in an ungreased rectangular baking dish, measuring 12 x 7-1/2 x 2 inches.
5. Top the potatoes with onion, bell pepper, bacon, corn, and cheese.
6. Mix the remaining ingredients (eggs, salt, ground red pepper) except paprika.
7. Pour the mixture over the cheese.
8. Sprinkle with paprika.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Serve 6 portions; each serving contains approximately 350 calories.
